steps.title: Identify the signal
steps.content: The team's conclusion is that “certain microbes in the soil might explain the difference” between healthy and diseased plants. To directly support this, I need evidence showing which specific microbes differ between healthy and diseased plants.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct response directly shows that healthy plants have significantly higher concentrations of microbes known to inhibit the disease-causing bacterium—the microbial difference that explains their protection.
  • The response about disease bacteria being present equally regardless of plant health does not show that other microbes explain the difference between healthy and diseased plants.
  • The response about disease occurring regardless of microbial differences contradicts the conclusion.
  • The response about moisture discusses moisture instead of microbes.
That confirms A is correct.
